ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Field Types.

[Guid("4CA2D959-5A38-11D2-AABD-00C04FA37585")]
public enum esriFieldType

Fields

esriFieldTypeBigInteger = 13

13: 64-bit Integer.

esriFieldTypeBlob = 8

8: Binary Large Object.

esriFieldTypeDate = 5

5: Date.

esriFieldTypeDouble = 3

3: Double-precision floating-point number.

esriFieldTypeGUID = 10

10: Globally Unique Identifier.

esriFieldTypeGeometry = 7

7: Geometry.

esriFieldTypeGlobalID = 11

11: Esri Global ID.

esriFieldTypeInteger = 1

1: 32-bit Integer.

esriFieldTypeOID = 6

6: Integer representing an object identifier. 32-bit OID has a length of 4 bytes, and 64-bit OID has a length of 8 bytes.

esriFieldTypeRaster = 9

9: Raster.

esriFieldTypeSingle = 2

2: Single-precision floating-point number.

esriFieldTypeSmallInteger = 0

0: 16-bit Integer.

esriFieldTypeString = 4

4: Character string.

esriFieldTypeXML = 12

12: XML Document.
